017package org.apache.juneau.bean.openapi3;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.marshall.internal.ConverterUtils.*;
022
023import java.util.*;
024
025import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
026
027/**
028 * Allows configuration of the supported OAuth Flows.
029 *
030 * <p>
031 * The OAuthFlows Object allows configuration of the supported OAuth Flows. This object contains the configuration
032 * for different OAuth 2.0 flows that can be used to secure the API. Each flow type has its own specific configuration
033 * requirements and use cases.
034 *
035 * <h5 class='section'>OpenAPI Specification:</h5>
036 * <p>
037 * The OAuthFlows Object is composed of the following fields:
038 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
039 *    <li><c>implicit</c> ({@link OAuthFlow}) - Configuration for the OAuth Implicit flow
040 *    <li><c>password</c> ({@link OAuthFlow}) - Configuration for the OAuth Resource Owner Password flow
041 *    <li><c>clientCredentials</c> ({@link OAuthFlow}) - Configuration for the OAuth Client Credentials flow
042 *    <li><c>authorizationCode</c> ({@link OAuthFlow}) - Configuration for the OAuth Authorization Code flow
043 * </ul>
044 *
045 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
046 * <p class='bcode'>
047 *    <jc>// Construct using SwaggerBuilder.</jc>
048 *    OAuthFlows <jv>x</jv> = <jsm>oauthFlows</jsm>()
049 *       .setAuthorizationCode(<jsm>oauthFlow</jsm>()
050 *          .setAuthorizationUrl(<js>"https://example.com/oauth/authorize"</js>)
051 *          .setTokenUrl(<js>"https://example.com/oauth/token"</js>));
052 *
053 *    <jc>// Serialize using JsonSerializer.</jc>
054 *    String <jv>json</jv> = Json.<jsm>from</jsm>(<jv>x</jv>);
055 *
056 *    <jc>// Or just use toString() which does the same as above.</jc>
057 *    <jv>json</jv> = <jv>x</jv>.toString();
058 * </p>
059 * <p class='bcode'>
060 *    <jc>// Output</jc>
061 *    {
062 *       <js>"authorizationCode"</js>: {
063 *          <js>"authorizationUrl"</js>: <js>"https://example.com/oauth/authorize"</js>,
064 *          <js>"tokenUrl"</js>: <js>"https://example.com/oauth/token"</js>
065 *       }
066 *    }
067 * </p>
068 *
069 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
070 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://spec.openapis.org/oas/v3.0.0#oauth-flows-object">OpenAPI Specification &gt; OAuth Flows Object</a>
071 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/docs/specification/authentication/oauth2/">OpenAPI OAuth2 Authentication</a>
072 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauBeanOpenApi3">juneau-bean-openapi-v3</a>
073 * </ul>
074 */
075@SuppressWarnings({
076   "java:S115" // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention
077})
078public class OAuthFlows extends OpenApiElement {
079
080   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
081   private static final String ARG_property = "property";
082
083   // Property name constants
084   private static final String PROP_authorizationCode = "authorizationCode";
085   private static final String PROP_clientCredentials = "clientCredentials";
086   private static final String PROP_implicit = "implicit";
087   private static final String PROP_password = "password";
088
089   private OAuthFlow implicit;
090   private OAuthFlow password;
091   private OAuthFlow clientCredentials;
092   private OAuthFlow authorizationCode;
093
094   /**
095    * Default constructor.
096    */
097   public OAuthFlows() {}
098
099   /**
100    * Copy constructor.
101    *
102    * @param copyFrom The object to copy.
103    */
104   public OAuthFlows(OAuthFlows copyFrom) {
105      super(copyFrom);
106
107      this.implicit = copyFrom.implicit;
108      this.password = copyFrom.password;
109      this.clientCredentials = copyFrom.clientCredentials;
110      this.authorizationCode = copyFrom.authorizationCode;
111   }
112
113   /**
114    * Make a deep copy of this object.
115    *
116    * @return A deep copy of this object.
117    */
118   public OAuthFlows copy() {
119      return new OAuthFlows(this);
120   }
121
122   @Override /* Overridden from SwaggerElement */
123   public <T> T get(String property, Class<T> type) {
124      assertArgNotNull(ARG_property, property);
125      return switch (property) {
126         case PROP_implicit -> toType(getImplicit(), type);
127         case PROP_password -> toType(getPassword(), type);
128         case PROP_clientCredentials -> toType(getClientCredentials(), type);
129         case PROP_authorizationCode -> toType(getAuthorizationCode(), type);
130         default -> super.get(property, type);
131      };
132   }
133
134   /**
135    * Bean property getter:  <property>authorizationCode</property>.
136    *
137    * <p>
138    * Describes the type of items in the array.
139    *
140    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
141    */
142   public OAuthFlow getAuthorizationCode() { return authorizationCode; }
143
144   /**
145    * Bean property getter:  <property>clientCredentials</property>.
146    *
147    * <p>
148    * Describes the type of items in the array.
149    *
150    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
151    */
152   public OAuthFlow getClientCredentials() { return clientCredentials; }
153
154   /**
155    * Bean property getter:  <property>implicit</property>.
156    *
157    * <p>
158    * Describes the type of items in the array.
159    *
160    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
161    */
162   public OAuthFlow getImplicit() { return implicit; }
163
164   /**
165    * Bean property getter:  <property>password</property>.
166    *
167    * <p>
168    * Describes the type of items in the array.
169    *
170    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
171    */
172   public OAuthFlow getPassword() { return password; }
173
174   @Override /* Overridden from SwaggerElement */
175   public Set<String> keySet() {
176      // @formatter:off
177      var s = stb(String.class)
178         .addIf(nn(authorizationCode), PROP_authorizationCode)
179         .addIf(nn(clientCredentials), PROP_clientCredentials)
180         .addIf(nn(implicit), PROP_implicit)
181         .addIf(nn(password), PROP_password)
182         .build();
183      // @formatter:on
184      return new MultiSet<>(s, super.keySet());
185   }
186
187   @Override /* Overridden from SwaggerElement */
188   public OAuthFlows set(String property, Object value) {
189      assertArgNotNull(ARG_property, property);
190      return switch (property) {
191         case PROP_authorizationCode -> setAuthorizationCode(toType(value, OAuthFlow.class));
192         case PROP_clientCredentials -> setClientCredentials(toType(value, OAuthFlow.class));
193         case PROP_implicit -> setImplicit(toType(value, OAuthFlow.class));
194         case PROP_password -> setPassword(toType(value, OAuthFlow.class));
195         default -> {
196            super.set(property, value);
197            yield this;
198         }
199      };
200   }
201
202   /**
203    * Bean property setter:  <property>authorizationCode</property>.
204    *
205    * <p>
206    * Describes the type of items in the array.
207    *
208    * @param value
209    *    The new value for this property.
210    *    <br>Property value is required if <code>type</code> is <js>"array"</js>.
211    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
212    * @return This object
213    */
214   public OAuthFlows setAuthorizationCode(OAuthFlow value) {
215      authorizationCode = value;
216      return this;
217   }
218
219   /**
220    * Bean property setter:  <property>items</property>.
221    *
222    * <p>
223    * Describes the type of items in the array.
224    *
225    * @param value
226    *    The new value for this property.
227    *    <br>Property value is required if <code>type</code> is <js>"array"</js>.
228    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
229    * @return This object
230    */
231   public OAuthFlows setClientCredentials(OAuthFlow value) {
232      clientCredentials = value;
233      return this;
234   }
235
236   /**
237    * Bean property setter:  <property>items</property>.
238    *
239    * <p>
240    * Describes the type of items in the array.
241    *
242    * @param value
243    *    The new value for this property.
244    *    <br>Property value is required if <code>type</code> is <js>"array"</js>.
245    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
246    * @return This object
247    */
248   public OAuthFlows setImplicit(OAuthFlow value) {
249      implicit = value;
250      return this;
251   }
252
253   /**
254    * Bean property setter:  <property>items</property>.
255    *
256    * <p>
257    * Describes the type of items in the array.
258    *
259    * @param value
260    *    The new value for this property.
261    *    <br>Property value is required if <code>type</code> is <js>"array"</js>.
262    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
263    * @return This object
264    */
265   public OAuthFlows setPassword(OAuthFlow value) {
266      password = value;
267      return this;
268   }
269
270   @Override /* Overridden from OpenApiElement */
271   public OAuthFlows strict(Object value) {
272      super.strict(value);
273      return this;
274   }
275
276   @Override /* Overridden from SwaggerElement */
277   protected OAuthFlows strict() {
278      super.strict();
279      return this;
280   }
281}
